description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly blue color scheme and a glossy black marquee at the top. The front panel includes a large display screen, a single joystick, and a button, suggesting a single-player setup, along with a coin slot and access door below. The side panels are decorated with stylized graphics of a running refrigerator character and glowing 'RR' initials, adding a playful and retro aesthetic. The back of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation grilles and access panels, typical for maintenance. The cabinet appears to be constructed mainly from wood or MDF with a laminate finish, metal components for the controls and coin mechanism, and a glass or plastic screen cover. The overall build is robust and designed for public or semi-public urban environments such as arcades, laundromats, or recreation centers.
description: A blue upright arcade game cabinet with a large screen, single joystick, coin slot, and playful side graphics of a running refrigerator and glowing 'RR' initials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, joystick, button, coin slot, and access door, with the illuminated marquee above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the running refrigerator character and 'RR' initials on a blue gradient background.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black panel with ventilation grilles and access panels, no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same running refrigerator character and 'RR' initials.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single joystick and one button, arranged for single-player use, with a simple and uncluttered layout
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features glowing white text and a blue gradient background, matching the playful and retro theme of the cabinet
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a stylized running refrigerator character and glowing 'RR' initials on a blue gradient background
